name: Bacon and Egg Casserole (Microwave)
recipeIngredient: 1/4 pound bacon, cut into 1 1/2 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Place bacon in a 9-inch pie plate. Cover loosely with microwave-safe paper towel. Cook on high for 3 minutes. Drain off fat, reserving 1 tablespoon in a small custard cup; set aside. Stir pepper and mushrooms into bacon; cover; cook on high for 2 minutes.
2. In a small bowl, beat eggs with 3 tablespoons water. Pour over bacon mixture. Cook, uncovered, on High for 2 minutes. Stir; cook 1 minute longer, or until just set.
3. In a small bowl, blend soup with 2 tablespoons water; pour over eggs. Add bread crumbs to reserved bacon fat; sprinkle over soup on eggs. Cook on high for 30 seconds.
